name: testSelectingRowsPerPageOptionUpdatesFieldValue
description: Verify Selecting 'Rows Per Page' Option Updates the Field Value.
descriptionHtml: Verify Selecting 'Rows Per Page' Option Updates the Field Value.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify Selecting 'Rows Per Page' Option Updates the Field Value.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The Rows Per Page' value is set to '10'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The Rows Per Page' value is set to '25'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The Rows Per Page' value is set to '50'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The Rows Per Page' value is set to '100'
